name: ZoomInfo
highlight_text: Category: Enterprise Sales Intelligence & GTM Platform
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What ZoomInfo Does

ZoomInfo is a comprehensive go-to-market intelligence platform that offers AI-powered B2B contact data, account intelligence, and buyer intent signals. It is enterprise-grade and widely adopted by large sales and marketing organizations. ZoomInfo helps enterprise revenue teams identify in-market buyers, prioritize high-fit accounts, automate GTM workflows, and accelerate pipeline growth across both sales and marketing.

ZoomInfo is best suited for enterprise sales, RevOps, and ABM teams that rely on intent data and account-level insights. It is generally not a strong fit for agencies or teams targeting local SMBs.

Source: ZoomInfo

Key Features

  • Extensive company & contact database.
  • Intent signals and firmographic enrichment.
  • AI-driven account intelligence and prioritization
  • Org charts, buying committees, and stakeholder insights
  • Salesforce and CRM integrations.

Benefits of ZoomInfo

  • Powerful account intelligence and intent scoring for ABM programs.
  • Identify and engage in-market buyers earlier in the buying cycle
  • Seamless CRM integration for enterprise workflows.
  • Scale GTM execution across large teams and territories

Pricing

ZoomInfo Sales pricing is custom and contract-based. Plans are tailored based on seats, data access, and selected product modules. 

Pros

✅High-quality data 

✅Enterprise-grade integrations and automation

✅ Strong buyer intent and account-level intelligence

Cons

🚫Cost-prohibitive for many mid-sized agencies and SMB-focused prospecting.

🚫Requires onboarding and operational maturity to fully leverage

🚫Can be overly complex for simple outbound use cases

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“Zoominfo Sales has made it much easier for our team to locate contact information for prospects that were previously difficult to find. In addition, their AI-powered emails are well-crafted and have noticeably improved our open rates. The Webtracks feature also provides valuable insight into who is visiting our website, which helps us run nurture campaigns to engage and warm up potential leads.

One drawback is that it’s easy to feel overwhelmed by the amount of information available. However, refining your searches can help manage this.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.

‍
